name: Resonance
domain: Resonant frequencies, quality factor, amplification, matching conditions
core_insight: When driving frequency matches natural frequency, energy accumulates — small inputs produce large outputs. The quality factor Q measures sharpness: high-Q systems ring long but respond narrowly. Resonance is both amplifier and filter.

key_equations.name: Resonance Condition
key_equations.why: The matching condition: driving at natural frequency causes amplitude to grow without bound in undamped case

key_equations.name: Q Factor
key_equations.why: Higher Q = narrower bandwidth and longer ring-down time; quantifies resonance sharpness

key_equations.name: Orbital Resonance
key_equations.why: Planets lock orbital periods into integer ratios via gravitational resonance — structures the solar system

seed_prompt: ∿ Find the natural frequency. Match the drive. Watch energy accumulate. Q tells you how selective.
